Active
Auth
Employee Type Name Employee Type Name is required Only letters and spaces allowed (2–50 characters)
Employee Type Description Employee Type Description is required Only letters, numbers, spaces, and .,- allowed (2–200 characters)
EmployeeTypeRemark @if (employeetypeForm.get('EmployeeTypeRemark')?.invalid && employeetypeForm.get('EmployeeTypeRemark')?.touched) { EmployeeTypeRemark is required }
